title: Redis bus subscriber re-subscribes on every recv() call
description: In bus.rs RedisSubscriber::recv() (line 228), self.conn.subscribe(REDIS_CHANNEL) is called inside the recv loop on every invocation, not once at connection time. Each recv() re-issues SUBSCRIBE, leaking Redis subscription slots and causing incorrect behavior (duplicate message delivery, excessive Redis round-trips). Fix: call subscribe() once in RedisClient::subscribe() when creating the RedisSubscriber, not on each recv().
